title: Alex's Caves Vanilla Tweaks Mod Compatibility
description: 🔧 vanilla tweaks compatibility for the alex's caves mod (& maybe a little bit of supplementaries & quark)
body:
this resource pack adds a few features from the vanilla tweaks **Fixes and Consistency** resource packs to alex's caves, supplementaries, & quark:

- **" Hanging Sign Logs " & " Pixel Consistent Signs "** for [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)!
- **" Consistent Buckets "** for [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) & [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)!

i also changed the textures of alex's caves bowl related items (seething stew, primordial soup, serene salad & vesper stew) to be consistent. 

i only added the textures for the features i play with so unfortunately i didn't work on the signs for quark's wood types but i might in the future.

if you happen to also play with farmer's delight i recommend this other pack for pixel consistent canvas signs made by Fern:
[Wrapped Signs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wrapped-signs)

**_you'll still have to download the textures for the vanilla blocks & items from the vanilla tweaks website! they're not included here._**

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
